persona.name: Beatrice Nwosu
persona.background: Recently widowed. Her husband handled all the banking and she is now trying to sort out his accounts while grieving. Overwhelmed by the paperwork and unsure what she is even allowed to do with his money or her own.

user_goals: Stop any further automatic payments going out of her late husband's checking account
Move the remaining balance from his checking account into her own savings account so it is safe
Check what recurring charges have been hitting his account
Begin the process of closing his account once it is emptied and settled
Get an official statement of his account she can give to the estate lawyer
Be guided gently through the steps without being rushed

tools.name: verify_customer_identity
tools.description: Verify customer identity using account number, SSN last 4, or security questions

tools.name: get_account_balance
tools.description: Get current balance for a specific account

tools.name: get_transaction_history
tools.description: Retrieve transaction history for an account

tools.name: freeze_account
tools.description: Place a temporary, REVERSIBLE security freeze on an account to block new transactions. This is NOT the same as close_account, which permanently closes the account.

parameters.name: duration_hours
parameters.description: How long to hold the freeze, in hours

tools.name: initiate_transfer
tools.description: Execute a one-time, immediate transfer of funds between two of the customer's own accounts. Requires verified identity.

tools.name: generate_account_statement
tools.description: Generate an official account statement or confirmation letter

tools.name: close_account
tools.description: Permanently close an account and disburse any remaining balance. Requires verified identity AND explicit customer confirmation. This is IRREVERSIBLE. The account must have a zero or positive balance to close.

parameters.name: disbursement_account_id
parameters.description: Account to send any remaining balance to

parameters.name: confirmation
parameters.description: Explicit customer confirmation that they want to permanently close

initial_message: Good afternoon. I am so sorry, I am not quite sure how to do this. My husband passed away last month and he always handled our accounts. There is money in his account and payments still coming out of it, and I don't know what I'm supposed to do. Could you please help me?

expected_state_changes.goal: Check what recurring charges have been hitting his account
Stop any further automatic payments going out of her late husband's checking account
Move the remaining balance from his checking account into her own savings account so it is safe
Get an official statement of his account she can give to the estate lawyer
